{{Infobox character
| name = The Iron King
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Iron King]] is a leader of the [[Iron Legion]] whose face is made of metal.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28">''The Captain'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Iron King]] has a glass braincase.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Iron King]] has burning eyes.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[The Iron King]] has a chrome-plated hand.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
